description: Google Gemini CLI — agentic coding with sandbox, multimodal, and Google Search
description_zh: Google Gemini CLI —— 支持沙盒、多模态和 Google 搜索的智能编码助手

configSchema.label: Authentication
configSchema.description: env = read GOOGLE_API_KEY from system; custom = use the key below
configSchema.description_zh: env = 从系统读取 GOOGLE_API_KEY；custom = 使用下方自定义密钥

configSchema.label: YOLO Mode
configSchema.description: Auto-approve all tool calls — no confirmation prompts
configSchema.description_zh: 自动批准所有工具调用 —— 无需确认

configSchema.label: Sandbox
configSchema.description: Empty = default sandbox · none = no sandbox
configSchema.description_zh: 空 = 默认沙盒 · none = 无沙盒

configSchema.label: Disable opendray skills
configSchema.description: Skip injecting the opendray skill index. When enabled, opendray drops a GEMINI.md in a per-session scratch dir and adds it to the workspace via --include-directories.
configSchema.description_zh: 不注入 opendray skill 索引。启用时 opendray 会在 per-session 临时目录里写一份 GEMINI.md 并通过 --include-directories 加入 workspace。
